notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Shane McClanahan. Jose Siri scores. Logan O'Hoppe to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Wade Meckler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Wade Meckler grounds out, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Donovan Walton pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Donovan Walton singles on a ground ball to left fielder Chandler Simpson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Angels challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Junior Caminero to 2nd. Junior Caminero advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Wade Meckler pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Donovan Walton pinch-hit
